title: Braaibroodjies – traditional and a winner
excerpt: Look, I can braai without meat as long as I have a braaibroodjie. People put all kinds of fancy things on braaibroodjies. I like it the way I like his mother – just the essentials. The secret of the sandwich is that you have to braai it slowly over the coals so the cheese melts nicely …

seo.title: Braaibroodjies - traditional and a winner - Marinda Kook

html:
Look, I can braai without meat as long as I have a braaibroodjie. People put all kinds of fancy things on braaibroodjies. I like it the way I like its mother – just the essentials. The secret of the sandwich is that you have to braai it slowly over the coals so the cheese melts nicely.

 

NEEDED:

  • 6 slices bread
  • butter for spreading
  • grated cheddar cheese
  • onion sliced into thin rings
  • tomato sliced into thin rings
  • salt and pepper

NOW:

  1. spread your bread with butter – generously
  2. put grated cheese on top
  3. put tomato on top and season with salt and pepper
  4. put thin onion rings on top and close it up
  5. braai slowly over moderate coals until nicely browned and the cheese has melted

Braaibroodjies are the king of any braai.

If you can make or braai braaibroodjies, you're allowed to get married.
